---
name: Security concern
about: Report a potential security or trust concern in HC:// TRUST LAYER.
title: "[Security] "
labels: [security]
assignees: []
---

## Summary
Describe the security concern at a high level.

## Vulnerability or concern details
Describe the issue, possible attack path, and affected components.

## Expected behavior
Describe the secure behavior you expected.

## Actual behavior
Describe the observed behavior.

## Affected file or record
Provide the relevant file path, record, endpoint, schema field, or workflow.

## Verification impact
Explain how this concern affects verification reliability, reproducibility, or evidence quality.

## Security / trust impact
Explain potential impact on integrity, confidentiality, availability, or trust assumptions.

## Recommended mitigation (optional)
Share any mitigation ideas if available.

## Safe disclosure notes
Do not include secrets, private keys, or exploit code in public reports.
Use SECURITY.md for responsible disclosure when needed.
